contents_tesim: Ecloga 21, De imperio, potestate et gloria (CPG 4684.21)
full_text_tesim: Ecloga 21, De imperio, potestate et gloria (CPG 4684.21)
Elegant, very small upright minuscule, resembling the earliest examples of “Perlschrift”
One folio of Sin. gr. 962 corresponds to one quarter of the original folio with the Chrysostom text. The original manuscript was of large size, measuring approximately 300x200 mm
